subcodes.first_line: O thou servant of the Blessed Beauty's Threshold! Thy letter was reviewed, and through the bounties of the True One, my hope is thus [3.5s]
subcodes.first_line_orig: ای بنده آستان جمال مبارک نامه شما ملاحظه گردید از عنایت حق امیدم چنان است که
subcodes.subjects: @personal instructions, @permission for visit; pilgrimage, @divine grace, bounty, confirmations; spiritual capacity, @travels to the West by Abdu'l-Baha
